name: Content Moderation
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Content Safety
services.purpose: Multi-category moderation — hate, violence, self-harm, sexual content + Prompt Shields

services.name: Azure API Management
services.purpose: API gateway — rate limiting, authentication, request routing, analytics

prod.note: Built-in cache, 1 scale unit, developer portal

enterprise.note: Multi-region, VNet integration, custom CA, 2+ scale units

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Moderation pipeline — pre-processing, scoring, routing, custom blocklist checks

enterprise.note: Pre-warmed instances, VNet, no cold starts

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Moderation results store — audit trail, severity scores, appeal records

services.name: Azure Service Bus
services.purpose: Async moderation queue — decouple submission from processing for high throughput

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Content Safety API keys, APIM certificates, managed identity secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Moderation metrics — block rates, severity distribution, latency, false positive tracking

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Audit logging — all moderation decisions logged for compliance, KQL analysis

optimization_tips: Use Content Safety free tier for dev — 5K transactions/month is sufficient for testing
Use API Management Consumption tier for dev — avoids $150/month Standard tier cost
Batch moderation requests where possible — reduces per-transaction overhead
Use Service Bus dead-letter queues to reprocess failed moderations — avoids lost requests
Set TTL on Cosmos DB raw content (30 days) — keep only metadata long-term for compliance
Use custom blocklists to fast-reject known-bad content before calling AI — saves API costs
